item.title: Use printf instead of echo for variable output throughout the script
item.intent: Replace ~20 instances of echo with variable arguments with printf to avoid issues when variables start with dash or contain escape sequences, following POSIX best practices
steps: Find all echo calls that output variable content (not static strings)
Replace with printf '%s\n' for simple variable output
Leave echo for static string literals which are safe
acceptanceCriteria: No echo call outputs an unquoted or potentially-dash-prefixed variable
